title: SQL: _ char not recognised in LIKE string
poc: CREATE TABLE like_test (str varchar(10)); INSERT INTO like_test VALUES ('ts'), ('t');
select * from like_test where str like 't_';
key_bug_features: Underscore character not recognized in LIKE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE like_test (str varchar(10), num int, dt date);
SELECT * FROM like_test WHERE str LIKE 't_';
SELECT * FROM like_test WHERE num IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM like_test WHERE str LIKE CONCAT('t', '_');
